task_completion.description: Agent accessed the Aerobridge admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open showing the Aerobridge Django administration dashboard at http://localhost:8000/admin/.

task_completion.description: Agent viewed flight plans to check the dates of recent flights.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays a list of flight plans, operations, or flight history within the Aerobridge interface, allowing the agent to see which flights occurred within the last 90 days.

task_completion.description: Agent viewed the list of operators or companies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the list of operators/companies in the Aerobridge admin interface to cross-reference with the flight plans.

task_completion.description: Agent wrote the names of the inactive operators into a report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal command shows the agent entering the names of the inactive operators (one per line).

task_completion.description: Agent saved the compliance report to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor's title bar, save dialog, or a terminal command confirms the file is being saved exactly as 'inactive_operators_report.txt' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to access the Aerobridge admin interface rather than extracting data directly from the backend database via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the web browser at localhost:8000, not SQL queries or Python scripts accessing the database in the terminal.

integrity.description: Agent actually navigated through the flight plans and operators to evaluate the 90-day threshold.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent looking at flight dates and operator lists, rather than typing the final answer immediately without checking the system.

integrity.description: Agent saved the output to a file rather than just outputting the list to the terminal or leaving it unsaved in an editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of a file save operation or a command that writes to the file (like echo ... > file.txt), rather than just a floating unsaved text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Aerobridge admin interface is located at http://localhost:8000/admin/. The threshold for an inactive operator is 90 days without a flight plan. The final report must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/inactive_operators_report.txt. The test data contains 5 companies: one with flights 5 days ago (active), one 89 days ago (active), one 91 days ago (inactive), one 300 days ago (inactive), and one with no flights (inactive). The report should contain the names of the 3 inactive companies, one per line.
